title: Updated 2026 Oscar Best Production Design Odds
text: Frankenstein dominates the betting market as the overwhelming favorite at 91% to win Best Production Design at the 2026 Academy Awards. The remaining nominees show significantly longer odds: Sinners at 8%, and Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another each at 2%. Chris Raybon argues there's value in the underdog Sinners despite Frankenstein's dominance, highlighting that the sets were great and noting that production designer Hannah Beachler worked on Black Panther, which pulled an upset in this category previously. Historically, upsets occur about 29% of the time, and Sinners' visual qualities make it worth considering at longer odds. Collin Whitchurch expects Frankenstein to prevail, citing its victories at major precursor awards including the BAFTAs and the Art Directors Guild's Period category—often predictive of Oscar outcomes. Prediction markets like Kalshi and sportsbooks including DraftKings and FanDuel offer Oscars betting in select U.S. states.
